Salesforce Personalization Mandatory pre-work

Partner EGM Enablement 2026 · Madrid

Mandatory pre-work before the event

16–17 June 2026 · Madrid

Complete the seven modules below before you join us at Partner EGM Enablement 2026. This is the required theory and setup track so you can focus on hands-on labs during the event.

This guide includes only those mandatory modules—no links to the full Partner Workshops catalog. Advanced implementation topics and remaining labs will be covered in person in Madrid.

Work through the modules in order, or open the topic you are on:

  1. Setup Personalization

    Administrator · Foundational · ~1 hr

  2. Web Sitemap

    Developer · Intermediate · ~1 hr 10 mins

  3. Web Schemas

    Developer · Intermediate · ~10 mins

  4. Data Streams

    Administrator · Intermediate · ~20 mins

  5. Identity Resolution

    Developer · Foundational · ~10 mins

  6. Item Data Graphs

    Administrator · Foundational · ~20 mins

  7. Profile Data Graphs

    Administrator · Foundational · ~30 mins

Partner EGM Enablement 2026

16–17 June 2026 · Madrid

Mandatory pre-work for attendees. Complete all seven modules before the event. Hands-on exercises during the enablement are separate from this guide.

Exercise links inside each module (SDO, Postman, Chrome Web Store, sample data files, etc.) are included only where the lab requires them.
